PigeonPost Setup
Local-first email, by Oliver Ernster

Install PigeonPost

A calmer, local-first desktop email client. This installs for your user account only, no administrator rights needed.

Install location

PigeonPost is installed

You can repair the installation, change startup options or remove PigeonPost.

Update available

A newer version of PigeonPost is ready to install. Your accounts and mail are kept.

→

Remove PigeonPost?

This removes PigeonPost and its shortcuts from your computer.
